summary: Completed testing of 4 new SynthOps features: Customer CRM, Stock/Asset Management, Health Check server sorting, and Health Check draft save/resume. All 16 test scenarios passed. Fixed 2 minor SelectItem bugs in Customers.jsx and Stock.jsx where empty string values caused React errors.
passed_tests: Customer CRM page loads at /customers with stats cards (Total Customers, Active, Total Contract Value, With Notes)
Customer CRM - Add Customer button opens dialog with Basic Info, Contract, and Other tabs
Customer CRM - Create a new customer with name, contact info (Jane Smith, jane@testcustomer.test)
Customer CRM - Customer appears in table after creation with correct stats update
Customer CRM - Click on customer row opens detail dialog with Contact Information and Contract Details
Customer CRM - Add a note to a customer - 'Note added' toast appears and note count updates
Customer CRM - Edit customer via dropdown menu opens dialog with pre-filled data
Stock & Assets page loads at /stock with stats cards (Total Assets, In Stock, Deployed, Total Value)
Stock & Assets - Add Asset button opens dialog with Basic Info, Purchase & Warranty, and Assignment tabs
Stock & Assets - Create a new asset with name, type, manufacturer, model, serial number, cost ($25,000)
Stock & Assets - Asset appears in table after creation with stats update (1 Total, 1 In Stock, $25,000 value)
Stock & Assets - Click on asset row opens view dialog with Hardware Details and Purchase & Warranty sections
Stock & Assets - Edit asset via dropdown menu opens dialog with pre-filled data
Monthly Health Check at /dc-health-check - Server dropdown is sorted alphabetically by client name
Monthly Health Check - Save Progress button saves draft with toast 'Progress saved - you can continue later'
Monthly Health Check - History tab shows drafts with yellow 'Draft' badge and Continue button to resume

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value caused React error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and added value conversion logic in 'Link to TRMM Client' and 'Account Manager' selects

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value caused same React error
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and added value conversion logic in 'Assigned to Customer' select

critical_code_review_comments: All features properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
Server sorting in Health Check uses getClientName function and sorts alphabetically
Draft save feature properly tracks is_draft flag and completed_count/total_count
Customer notes feature working with encryption (encrypt_field/decrypt_field)
Asset view dialog shows all hardware details in organized sections
seed_data_creation: Created test customer 'TEST_Customer Inc' and asset 'PowerEdge R750' (will remain in DB for manual verification)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features fully tested and working. Customer CRM at /customers - full CRUD plus notes. Stock & Assets at /stock - full CRUD with view dialog. Health Check at /dc-health-check - server sorting by client name confirmed (Acorns Project, Advanced Workshop, etc.). Draft save works with Continue button in History tab. Two SelectItem bugs were fixed (empty string values). Test data exists: 1 customer, 1 asset, 3 draft health checks. Login: admin@test.com / Test123!
